name: bears-app-based-workflow
description: Spec Kit-style app workflow plugin for Bears waves, functional graphs, task ledgers, hardened dispatch packets, and app development orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Wave-based app specification, planning, hardening, analysis, and development orchestration.
interface.longDescription: Bears App-Based Workflow provides a Spec Kit-style application workflow: constitution, research waves, detailed specification, functional graph planning, ledger tasks, read-only wave instruction hardening, analysis, and app-dev orchestration.
